cases: provider exception becomes an error observation while Registry navigation remains available
stale cached health remains explicitly stale
future observation timestamps become unknown rather than fresh
missing active artifacts become warning failures
missing draft publications remain unknown rather than errors
corrupt SW-009 journals become hashed local failures without aborting collection
tampered Regie effect receipts fail before active-job projection
freshness and provider summary cannot be relabelled by rehashing the snapshot
duplicate publication, failure, job, observation and profile identifiers fail closed
HTTP POST requests return read-only service
invalid session token or loopback Host header blocks private API reads
